title: Stable Chat
abstract: Stable Chat is a general-purpose LLM that handles conversation, content generation, analysis, and code. It is the closest thing to a full-stack team member you can run on a single machine. Stabilit...
abstract_zh: Stable Chat就像你的个人全能助手，既能聊天下大事，也能写代码搞分析。它就是你桌面上的“全栈队友”，单机运行就能搞定一切！不过小心别让它跑了题，不然聊天可能会变成代码马拉松……
